Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Grandmaster Naraka]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Grandmaster Naraka is Alin's teacher and is over one hundred years old.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Grandmaster Naraka wears thick, dark red lenses that she calls glasses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Grandmaster Naraka told Alin that the only way to become a Traveler is to Travel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Grandmaster Naraka has sentries posted on the other side.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Grandmaster Naraka is a Grandmaster in Enosh and is rumored to be over one hundred years old.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Grandmaster Naraka had a granddaughter who was a Naraka Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Grandmaster Naraka has a gnarled face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Grandmaster Naraka has a banner above her featuring a clawed fist clutching a ball of flame on a red background.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Grandmaster Naraka's right hand was marked in her Territory decades ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Naraka is a Grandmaster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Grandmaster Naraka is a character who can produce red fireflies from her hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Grandmaster Naraka has a glowing red hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Grandmaster Naraka is associated with red fireflies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Grandmaster Naraka has experience with Endross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Grandmaster Naraka can summon a head that looks like a jet-black crocodile's head on a long, serpentine neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Grandmaster Naraka's hands were mangled, torn, and half-burnt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Grandmaster Naraka is a woman in need of help.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Grandmaster Naraka lost the stump of her right arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Grandmaster Naraka's left hand survived the trip through the Gate to Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Grandmaster Naraka's eyes were almost completely white.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Grandmaster Naraka was dragged to Elysia for healing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Grandmaster Naraka is a Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Grandmaster Naraka has one remaining hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Alin shook off Grandmaster Naraka.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Grandmaster Naraka is an Asphodel mist-binder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Grandmaster Naraka is a Grandmaster who waited outside the silver doors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Grandmaster Naraka stated that the Incarnations are free.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Grandmaster Naraka wears glasses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Grandmaster Naraka claims to have shed her old self to become an avatar of her Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Grandmaster Naraka burned the Tree in Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Grandmaster Naraka can contact the denizens of Naraka with her mind.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Grandmaster Naraka is with Eliadel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Grandmaster Naraka is an old woman with straggly white hair and cracked red spectacles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Grandmaster Naraka possesses a Naraka Traveler's brand on her palm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Grandmaster Naraka provided descriptions used to draw a map of Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Grandmaster Naraka is a one-handed woman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — The thought of Grandmaster Naraka blackens Alin's thoughts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Grandmaster Naraka stands beyond the Gate on red stones of Naraka.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Grandmaster Naraka is in control of herself while staring at Alin through the Naraka Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Grandmaster Naraka was on a mission to Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Grandmaster Naraka is currently bound, gagged, and guarded in the camp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Grandmaster Naraka did not protest when Leah ordered a prisoner punished.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Grandmaster Naraka betrayed the Queen of Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Grandmaster Naraka's right hand is a shriveled black claw crawling with orange flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Grandmaster Naraka's canines elongate into fangs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Grandmaster Naraka's transformation involves her body twisting and stretching into a hunched, serpentine form with pale white eyes that turn orange like live coals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Grandmaster Naraka has a red, pebbled tail with spikes on the end.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
